properties.name: app.admin.email
properties.description: Bootstrap email address for the seeded admin account.

properties.name: app.admin.password
properties.description: Bootstrap password for the seeded admin account.

properties.name: app.admin.name
properties.description: Display name for the seeded admin account.

properties.name: app.admin.phone
properties.description: Phone number for the seeded admin account.

properties.name: app.upload.dir
properties.description: Filesystem directory used to store uploaded product files.

properties.name: app.google.web-client-id
properties.description: Google OAuth web client ID used to validate ID tokens from the frontend.

properties.name: app.frontend.url
properties.description: Frontend base URL used for redirect targets after authentication.

properties.name: app.flutterwave.secret-key
properties.description: Secret key used for Flutterwave API requests.

properties.name: app.flutterwave.webhook-secret
properties.description: Expected verification secret for Flutterwave webhook requests.
